# Hemreform Göteborg

> Architecture, custom carpentry and total renovations in Gothenburg — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. From first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout. RUT/ROT.

> Hemreform erbjuder arkitektur, specialsnickeri och totalrenoveringar i Göteborg — för bostäder, lägenheter och lokaler. Från idé till nyckelklart. En ansvarig kontakt. RUT/ROT.

## Contact

- Website: https://goteborg.hemreform.se/
- Email: info@hemreform.se
- Phone: +46 76 232 68 74
- Location: Gothenburg, Sweden

Brand: Hemreform. This site is Hemreform Göteborg, part of the Hemreform network.

## Services

- Totalrenovering & projektledning — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arkitektur & design — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Prime kök & badrum — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Specialsnickeri & metallkonstruktioner — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Tekniska kontroller & tillstånd — technical checks, permit coordination and certified specialist procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/): Renovation guides and articles for Gothenburg

## Blog Articles

- [Badrumsrenovering bostadsrätt Göteborg](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-bostadsratt-goteborg/): Bathroom renovation in a housing cooperative in Gothenburg: HOA approval, waterproofing, certification, drains, ROT and what to know before starting.
- [Badrumsrenovering Göteborg 2026 – pris & ROT](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/badrumsrenovering-goteborg-pris/): What does a bathroom renovation cost in Gothenburg 2026? Price ranges, ROT deduction, waterproofing, HOA rules and what drives the cost.
- [Bygglov eller anmälan renovering Göteborg](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/bygglov-anmalan-renovering-goteborg/): Do you need building permits or notification for your renovation in Göteborg? Guide covering layout changes, load-bearing walls, ventilation and when startbesked is required.
- [Köksrenovering bostadsrätt Göteborg | BRF-regler](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-bostadsratt-goteborg/): Guide to kitchen renovation in a bostadsrätt in Göteborg. BRF approval, ventilation rules, electrical requirements and what triggers building notification.
- [Köksrenovering Göteborg pris 2026](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/koksrenovering-goteborg-pris/): Price guide for kitchen renovation in Gothenburg 2026: material choices, layout, plumbing, electricity, ROT deduction and budget tips.
- [Lägenhetsrenovering Göteborg | Pris & planering](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/lagenhetsrenovering-goteborg/): Renovating an apartment in Gothenburg? Cost per sqm, timeline, HOA rules, ROT deduction and smart prioritisation for kitchen, bathroom and surfaces.
- [Renovera landshövdingehus Göteborg | Guide](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/landshovdingehus-renovering-goteborg/): Guide to renovating a landshövdingehus in Göteborg. Wooden construction, cultural heritage considerations, kitchen and bathroom renovation and BRF rules.
- [Specialsnickeri Göteborg | Garderober & förvaring](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/specialsnickeri-goteborg/): Custom carpentry in Gothenburg: built-in wardrobes, bookshelves, kitchens and smart storage for period, functionalist and modern homes.
- [Totalrenovering Göteborg | Pris per kvm](https://goteborg.hemreform.se/blogg/totalrenovering-goteborg-pris/): What does a full renovation cost in Gothenburg? Price per sqm, process, ROT deduction, project management and common mistakes to avoid.
